content:
# Pelican Lake Field

**Summary**: A field used as a case study for polymer flooding and well optimization.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] used the Pelican Lake field to model high viscosity (300 cP) and its corresponding horizontal well requirements.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- For 300 cP polymer, required lengths ranged from 500 ft to 1,300 ft based on viscoelasticity. ([[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023, p. 86]])
